Landing.heroTitle: Dynamic Forms Powered by Gemini AI
Landing.heroDescription: Draft a questionnaire from a prompt, customize with drag & drop builder, apply beautiful preset themes, and unlock deep insights from responses automatically.
Landing.mockDashboardSubtitle: Manage your dynamic forms and AI summaries
Landing.featuresTitle: Loaded with features for high conversion rates
Landing.featuresSubtitle: A simple, elegant way to build questionnaires, gather user response files, and run statistical analytics on submissions.
Landing.featAiDesc: Generate a complete form with headers, input fields, dropdowns, and settings from a single text prompt.
Landing.featDndDesc: Rearrange fields, customize layout, add validation rules, and edit content in real-time.
Landing.featThemeDesc: Choose from curated premium themes or customize colors, borders, fonts, and dark mode behavior.
Landing.featSecureDesc: Accept text, email, choices, and file uploads. Form validations are verified on client and server.
Landing.featAnalyticsDesc: Track views, submissions, conversion rates, and read AI-generated summaries of responses.
Landing.featEmbedDesc: Copy-paste standard iframe code, use react/next components, or share direct public links.
Landing.trustedBy: Trusted by developers and creators worldwide
Landing.footerCtaTitle: Create your first AI form in seconds. No credit card required.

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.subtitle: Sign in to start creating forms with AI
Login.errorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
Login.errorInvalid: Invalid email or password. Please use: demo@demo.com / demo123

Dashboard.title: My Forms
Dashboard.subtitle: Manage your forms, generate schemas, and view responses
Dashboard.noFormsDesc: Create your first form using standard configuration or use AI prompt generation to start in seconds.
Dashboard.cardConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this form? This action cannot be undone.
Dashboard.modalCreateDesc: Start with a clean blank canvas. Give your form a title and description.
Dashboard.modalAiDesc: Describe the form you need, and our AI will generate all the fields, choices, validation rules, and layout automatically.
Dashboard.modalAiPlaceholder: e.g. A job application form for a Senior React developer including file upload for resume, contact details, and salary expectation...

Explore.title: Template Gallery
Explore.subtitle: Kickstart your collection workflows with pre-built form configurations crafted by industry experts.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your data collection needs. All plans include AI-powered summaries.

free.name: Starter
free.desc: Perfect for personal projects and testing.

pro.name: Professional
pro.desc: Best for growing creators and developers.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For scaling teams requiring full API controls.

Themes.title: Theme Gallery
Themes.subtitle: Explore beautiful hand-crafted styling presets designed to increase submission conversion rates.

Analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
Analytics.subtitle: Overview of form performance and responses across your workspace

Builder.shareDesc: Copy the direct link or embed the iframe script to display the form on your website.
Builder.sidebarAddFieldsDesc: Click or drag to add fields
Builder.sidebarSettingsDesc: Select a field on the canvas to edit its properties.
Builder.canvasEmptyDesc: Drag fields from the left sidebar or select from templates to populate fields.
Builder.subNoData: No submissions received for this form yet.
Builder.aiInsightsSubtitle: Gemini-generated synthesis of user responses and sentiment
Builder.aiInsightsNoData: Generate a few responses first to let Gemini analyze patterns.

PublicForm.submitSuccessDesc: Thank you! Your response has been recorded successfully.
PublicForm.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
PublicForm.fileDrag: Drag & drop files here, or click to upload
